title: TruePixelR - Modern Realistic PBR Textures
description: A Modern Realistic PBR Texture Pack
body:
**TruePixelR is a modern, cinematic texture pack built for realistic Minecraft. Every block is crafted with clean, architectural materials and full PBR support, making your worlds feel sharper, deeper, and more immersive.**

## **High resolution download from [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/TruePixelR)**

![TruePixelR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30c4273446f655a0289b44a66891da13857a42ca.jpeg)

### Features
- Modern, photoreal materials designed for clean builds
- Full PBR workflow (Albedo / Normal / Roughness / Height)
- POM (Parallax Occlusion Mapping) for extreme surface depth
- Four-way seamless tiling to reduce visible repeats
- Consistent art style from 64× to 1024×
- Monthly updates, ~20% of core blocks covered so far

### Compatibility
- Minecraft Java Edition: 1.16.5 → Latest
- Shaders: Bliss, Complementary Unbound, Kappa, SEUS PTGI HRR 2.1
- Requires: OptiFine or Iris (for shader support)
- POM: Supported on shaders that allow Parallax Occlusion Mapping

### Available Resolutions
- Free: 64×
- Pro: 128× / 256×
- Elite: 512× / 1024× (cinematic tier)

### How to Install
- Download the TruePixelR .zip for your chosen resolution
- Place it in the resourcepacks folder
- Enable it in Options → Resource Packs
- Install OptiFine or Iris + Sodium
- Select a shader (Bliss / Complementary Unbound / Kappa / SEUS PTGI HRR 2.1)
- Enable PBR/POM in shader settings
